name: pspf
description: Local-first PSPF Core, Workshop, and Explorer validation slice.

scripts.bundle:extensions: pnpm build && pnpm exec esbuild packages/core/src/extension.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --external:vscode --outfile=packages/core/dist/extension.js && pnpm exec esbuild packages/workshop/src/extension.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --external:vscode --outfile=packages/workshop/dist/extension.js
scripts.check:gates: pnpm build && node scripts/check-reference-data-baseline.mjs && node scripts/check-schema-policy.mjs && node scripts/check-schema-coverage.mjs && node scripts/check-personal-data-exclusion.mjs && node scripts/check-deployment-safety.mjs && node scripts/check-brief-redaction.mjs && node scripts/check-ism-drift.mjs && node scripts/check-explorer-publication.mjs && node scripts/check-explorer-local-authoring.mjs && node scripts/check-explorer-to-workshop-import.mjs && node scripts/check-writer-lock.mjs && node scripts/check-integrity-scan.mjs && node scripts/check-sample-workspace.mjs && node scripts/check-package-shape.mjs && node scripts/backup-restore-dry-run.mjs && node scripts/check-accessibility.mjs
scripts.e2e:v1.0: pnpm build && node scripts/e2e-v01.mjs && node scripts/check-reference-data-baseline.mjs && node scripts/check-personal-data-exclusion.mjs && node scripts/check-integrity-scan.mjs && node scripts/check-sample-workspace.mjs && node scripts/check-package-shape.mjs && node scripts/check-release-candidate.mjs
scripts.e2e:v1.1: pnpm run e2e:v1.0 && pnpm run check:explorer-local-authoring
scripts.e2e:v1.3: pnpm run e2e:v1.2 && pnpm run check:explorer-to-workshop-import
scripts.e2e:v1.6: pnpm run e2e:v1.5 && pnpm run check:explorer-to-workshop-import
scripts.e2e:v1.7: pnpm run e2e:v1.6 && pnpm run check:brief-redaction && pnpm run check:explorer-publication
scripts.e2e:v1.8: pnpm run e2e:v1.7 && pnpm run check:explorer-local-authoring && pnpm run check:explorer-to-workshop-import
scripts.e2e:v1.9: pnpm run e2e:v1.8 && pnpm run check:explorer-local-authoring && pnpm run check:explorer-to-workshop-import
scripts.validate:debug-workspace: pnpm build && node scripts/validate-debug-workspace.mjs && node scripts/check-personal-data-exclusion.mjs
scripts.release:readiness: pnpm e2e:v1.9 && pnpm check:gates && pnpm validate:debug-workspace && pnpm lint && pnpm check:release-candidate && node scripts/release-readiness.mjs
